_README: readmedaddy drift notifier for GitHub Copilot CLI. sessionEnd runs the local drift detector (POSIX sh + git, zero network); exit 2 surfaces the warning on stderr per Copilot's hook contract, and every other outcome stays silent. Notify-only: it cannot block, cannot edit files, cannot alter the agent. Installed by install.sh to ~/.copilot/hooks/readmedaddy.json. Per-repo off switch: {"hook":{"enabled":false}} in .readmedaddy.json.

sessionEnd.bash: f=$("$HOME/.copilot/skills/readmedaddy/hooks/readme-drift.sh" --check 2>/dev/null); rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'readmedaddy: %s changed but the README did not - ask for readmedaddy to refresh it.\n' "$(printf '%s' "$f" | tr '\n' ' ')" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
